# Legacy Task Archive Pointer

`tasks.md` at the project root is now the canonical task tracker for all new agent work.

Read in this order:

1. `agent.md`
2. `tasks.md`

This file is retained only as a compatibility/archive pointer for older tooling and historical references.
The previous phase-based MVP backlog is now legacy material and should be treated as archived in git history, not as the active source of truth.
